disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began within a couple of hours of a sudden, identifiable stressor (being told they had lost their job)
trigger_question_examples: What was happening just before this started?
Did something set this off today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I found out a couple of hours ago that I've lost my job, and it hit me really hard — I've been like this ever since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness and a feeling of not being able to catch breath, non-radiating, that eased with slow paced breathing
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me more about the chest tightness?
Does the chest tightness spread anywhere, and does anything change it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels really tight and I feel like I can't get a full breath. It doesn't spread to my arm or jaw. The slow breathing the nurse talked me through did ease it a bit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thoughts of harming self or others, no plan; denies wanting to end their life when asked sensitively
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people are this overwhelmed they have thoughts of not wanting to be here or of harming themselves — have you had any thoughts like that?
Are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I feel awful and overwhelmed but I would never do anything to hurt myself. I just want to feel calm and get some sleep.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Difficulty falling asleep over the past week, worse tonight
trigger_question_examples: How has your sleep been lately?
Have you been able to sleep this week?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My sleep has been terrible all week — I keep lying awake unable to switch off, and tonight there's no way I'll sleep.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Autonomic symptoms — sweating, tremor, palpitation sensation and a tension headache accompanying the distress
trigger_question_examples: What is your body doing right now — any sweating, shaking or a racing heart?
Do you have any other physical symptoms with this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm sweaty and shaking, my heart feels like it's pounding, and I've got a tight tension headache.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness is not brought on by exertion and there is no radiation to arm, jaw or back; no prior cardiac history
trigger_question_examples: Does the tightness come on when you exert yourself, or is it there at rest?
Have you ever had heart problems before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's not from moving around — it came on with the shock and the crying. I've never had any heart trouble that I know of.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mood is low and overwhelmed today but there is no prolonged low mood or loss of interest lasting weeks
trigger_question_examples: Before today, over the last few weeks, how had your mood and interest in things been?
Is this how you've been feeling for a while, or just since today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I was fine until today — I was coping okay before the news. This has all come on since I found out.
